2026-04-22T22:20:29.5048007Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-22T22:20:29.5048542Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-22T22:20:29.5048967Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-22T22:20:29.5049338Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-22T22:20:29.5049802Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-22T22:20:29.5050030Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-22T22:20:29.5050182Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m

2026-04-22T22:20:29.5050779Z [36;1m{[0m

2026-04-22T22:20:29.5051255Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-22T22:20:29.5051519Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m
